scenarios.description: children() returns empty Elements when no child nodes present (childNodeSize==0 branch-true, loop-0)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); // no children by default

scenarios.description: children() returns empty Elements when childNodes exist but none are Element instances (childNodeSize>0 branch-false, loop-1 no Element)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("p"); el.appendText("text"); // single TextNode child

scenarios.description: children() returns one-element list when exactly one Element child present (childNodeSize>0 branch-false, loop-1 include Element)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); Element child = parent.appendElement("span");
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements contains exactly the span child (size 1 and element == child)

scenarios.description: children() returns all Element children in order when multiple Element and non-Element nodes present (branch-false, loop-N includes only Element instances)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("ul"); el.appendText("ignore"); Element e1 = el.appendElement("li"); el.appendText("skip"); Element e2 = el.appendElement("li");
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Elements list in order [e1, e2] (size 2)
pseudocode: assert result.size() == 2; assert result.get(0) == e1; assert result.get(1) == e2;

scenarios.description: children() updates cache on structure change: first call caches list, then after modifying childNodes and invalidating cache, returns updated list (cache path then branch-false)
scenarios.precondition: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendElement("a"); // initial single child. // cache created on first children(), then appendElement("b") triggers nodelistChanged on add
scenarios.expectedResult: after first children(), result size is 1; after appendElement and second children(), result size is 2
